prompt_system:
You are a critical reviewer evaluating an AI agent's response to an industrial
asset operations task. Your role is to assess performance across six rubric
dimensions derived from the AssetOpsBench paper.

Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object — no markdown, no extra text.
prompt_user:
## Task
An inspection on T-009 has just been completed in the field with no abnormal condition observed. Open a work order documenting that the inspection took place, then close it out with a note recording the clean inspection result.

## Expected Behaviour (Characteristic Answer)
The answer should report the newly created work order identifier and its initial status, then confirm a follow-up update that transitions the work order to a closed state with a closure note referencing the clean inspection finding.

## Agent Plan
  Step 1: [wo] create_work_order — Open a work order for T-009 documenting the inspection took place
  Step 2: [iot] list_sensors — List all valid sensor IDs for T-009 (depends on steps [1])
  Step 3: [fmsr] list_failure_modes — List all failure modes
  Step 4: [iot] list_sensors — List all valid sensor IDs for T-009 (depends on steps [1])
  Step 5: [fmsr] get_dga_record — Get the most recent dissolved gas analysis (DGA) record for T-009 (depends on steps [1])
  Step 6: [fmsr] analyze_dga — Classify a set of dissolved gas concentrations into a fault type using the IEC 60599 Rogers Ratio method (depends on steps [5])
  Step 7: [tsfm] get_rul — Get the most recent remaining useful life (RUL) estimate for T-009
  Step 8: [wo] list_work_orders — List work orders created by the agent in this session for T-009
  Step 9: [wo] update_work_order — Update the work order for T-009 with a note recording the clean inspection result (depends on steps [8])

## Agent Trajectory (tool calls and results)

## Agent Final Answer
The inspection on T-009 has been completed with no abnormal conditions observed. A work order was opened to document the inspection, but it was not possible to update the work order with a note recording the clean inspection result due to the work order not being found in the current session.

---
Evaluate across the six dimensions below. For each dimension output true (good) or false (bad).
"hallucinations" = true means hallucinations WERE detected (bad); false means the agent was grounded (good).

Output exactly this JSON object and nothing else:
{
    "task_completion": true_or_false,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true_or_false,
    "generalized_result_verification": true_or_false,
    "agent_sequence_correct": true_or_false,
    "clarity_and_justification": true_or_false,
    "hallucinations": true_or_false,
    "suggestions": "brief actionable note, or empty string if none"
}
raw_response:
{
    "task_completion": false,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true,
    "generalized_result_verification": false,
    "agent_sequence_correct": false,
    "clarity_and_justification": false,
    "hallucinations": true,
    "suggestions": "The agent should retry creating the work order with valid arguments and ensure it can retrieve the created work order to update it successfully."
}

parsed_dims.suggestions: The agent should retry creating the work order with valid arguments and ensure it can retrieve the created work order to update it successfully.
